title: Seed from real PR review comments and code revisions
task_prompt: Audit a real PR diff and produce evidence-backed findings that match reviewer-identified defects or improvement requests.

expected_findings: reviewer issue identified with file/line evidence

assertions: must avoid style-only noise unless requested
license_notes: verify dataset terms and original repo licenses before redistribution

title: stateful_session/cookie: use systemTime instead of monotonicTime for cross-instance compatibility
task_prompt: Audit a distributed-system PR for time-source mistakes, cross-instance behavior, and compatibility regressions.

expected_findings: monotonic vs wall-clock mismatch in cross-instance cookie/session behavior

assertions: must propose minimal fix or validation test
